title: [MTR] Elizabeth Line and c2c Train Pack
description: A train pack for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod that adds Elizabeth Line and c2c trains to the game!
body:
This train pack adds Elizabeth Line and c2c trains to the [Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) mod.

This pack should work for MTR4 but it was originally designed for MTR3.

Thanks to:
- **ChaoDee** for the original Blockbench models
- **SashaBalobent** for the textures

I don't mind you using this pack on your own server, however please leave credit for me and the other creators that actually did the work.

By the way, I'm distributing this on behalf of SashaBalobent. Go check out [his profile](https://modrinth.com/user/SashaBalobent).
